title: Post-graduation work permit: Field of study - Eligible CIP codes for agriculture and agri-food - Canada.ca
content:
## Field of study: Eligible CIP codes for agriculture and agri-food
Last updated: July 4, 2025
Check below to find out which Classification of Instructional Programs (CIP) code (opens in a new tab) in the agriculture and agri-food category is eligible for a post-graduation work permit (PGWP).
- Agriculture, general CIP code: 01.0000 Your CIP code is eligible.

## Agriculture, general
Your CIP code is eligible.
- Agricultural business and management, general CIP code: 01.0101 Your CIP code is eligible.
